overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spacecraft flying over snowy mountainous terrain at night. The pilot navigates through clear starry skies initially, tilts up to observe a massive orbital structure overhead, then continues through a dense fog bank that significantly reduces visibility. High-fidelity game engine rendering with futuristic orange HUD elements.

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft low over snow-covered mountains with hands visible on flight controls

entered.detail: futuristic control panel with glowing orange HUD displays and radar screens
gloved hands gripping the flight control stick
expansive snow-covered peaks stretching to the horizon under starlight
clear dark night sky filled with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stable cockpit view flying over a vast snowy mountain range at night. The pilot's gloved hands are visible on the controls while the orange holographic HUD displays flight data. Clear starry skies provide natural illumination over the white terrain below.

events.description: camera pitches upward to reveal a massive orbital structure in the sky above
camera returns to forward-facing position over the mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: tilting the spacecraft upward to observe the orbital structure, then resuming forward flight over increasingly rugged terrain

entered.detail: massive space station or platform with glowing orange lights visible in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive illuminated orbital structure hovering above the atmosphere, then returns to a forward view. The terrain below becomes more rugged and mountainous as the craft continues its flight, with the pilot's hands no longer visible in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain range entering dense fog bank

events.description: dense fog bank rolls in over the mountains, significantly reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing flight as visibility degrades due to incoming fog and weather conditions

entered.detail: thick white fog rolling in over the mountain peaks, obscuring distant views

segments.scene_description: Visibility begins to deteriorate as a dense fog bank engulfs the mountain range. The orbital structure and starry sky disappear behind the thickening clouds, while the spacecraft continues flying through the increasingly obscured terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountains in heavy storm fog

events.description: brief partial clearing in fog reveals mountain peaks momentarily before closing in again

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense fog with occasional brief improvements in visibility

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft flies through heavy fog conditions with severely limited visibility. Brief clearings occasionally reveal the snow-covered mountain ridges before the fog closes in again, creating an atmospheric, low-visibility flight environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective that transitions from a clear, starry night flight over snowy mountains into a claustrophobic journey through dense fog. It begins with a stable view of a vast white mountain range under a starry sky, with the pilot's gloved hands visible against an orange holographic HUD. As the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive illuminated orbital structure hovering above the atmosphere, the view returns forward to a more rugged terrain while the pilot's hands move out of frame. The scene then shifts as a thick fog bank begins to engulf the landscape, swallowing the stars and the orbital station behind a wall of clouds. Finally, the spacecraft pushes through heavy fog with severely limited visibility, where only brief, flickering clearings reveal the snow-covered ridges before the mist closes in again.
